originalTitle: Wall St ends mixed as tech megacap losses outweigh upbeat chip outlook
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks ended mixed on Thursday, with the Dow ticking up more than a tenth of a percent, while the S&P 500 closed flat and the Nasdaq dropped nearly half a percent. Technology shares reversed early gains to move lower, as investors worried about hyperscaler spending on AI and who foots the bill. :: Micron Those fears outweighed upbeat signals on AI demand from Micron, which gained nearly 16%, while shares of Sandisk soared 22%. Brian Mulberry, chief market strategist at Zacks Investment Management, notes that it's memory chip makers that are now leading the charge. "What's different about Micron, SanDisk, Western Digital, those types of names that are doing so well is that they're memory chips. And you have to have memory, specifically DRAM or H-band memory, if you're going to have enough computing power to do all the computations. That is nothing if you don't have memory to transfer it from one place to another. So one of the reasons that these stocks have done so well and the growth at Micron is so solid is because a recent redesign in the server technology means we go from eight memory chips per server to 96. That's 12 times growth in demand for this one simple component." The surging prices of memory and storage chips prompted Apple on Thursday to hike prices for its iPads and MacBooks. That weighed on the stock, sending it down more than 6%. Shares of Nvidia, Microsoft and Alphabet also dropped. :: Archive Among other movers, shares of Bio-Techne jumped after Merck agreed to acquire the biotech firm for $73 per share in cash, representing a total enterprise value of about $11.3 billion. :: Archive Meanwhile, U.S. Department of Commerce data on Thursday showed the annual inflation rate through May rose above 4% for the first time in three years, but oil prices this week fell to below pre-war levels.

Brian Mulberry, chief market strategist at Zacks Investment Management, notes that it's memory chip makers that are now leading the charge. "What's different about Micron, SanDisk, Western Digital, those types of names that are doing so well is that they're memory chips. And you have to have memory, specifically DRAM or H-band memory, if you're going to have enough computing power to do all the computations. That is nothing if you don't have memory to transfer it from one place to another. So one of the reasons that these stocks have done so well and the growth at Micron is so solid is because a recent redesign in the server technology means we go from eight memory chips per server to 96. That's 12 times growth in demand for this one simple component." The surging prices of memory and storage chips prompted Apple on Thursday to hike prices for its iPads and MacBooks. That weighed on the stock, sending it down more than 6%. Shares of Nvidia, Microsoft and Alphabet also dropped. :: Archive Among other movers, shares of Bio-Techne jumped after Merck agreed to acquire the biotech firm for $73 per share in cash, representing a total enterprise value of about $11.3 billion. :: Archive Meanwhile, U.S. Department of Commerce data on Thursday showed the annual inflation rate through May rose above 4% for the first time in three years, but oil prices this week fell to below pre-war levels.
chineseTitle: 由于科技巨头的损失超过了乐观的芯片前景，华尔街收盘涨跌互现
chineseSummary: 故事：美国股市周四收盘涨跌互现，道琼斯指数上涨逾十分之一，而标准普尔 500 指数收盘持平，纳斯达克指数下跌近 0.5%。由于投资者担心超大规模企业在人工智能方面的支出以及谁来买单，科技股扭转了早期涨幅，走低。 :: 美光科技 这些担忧盖过了美光科技对人工智能需求的乐观信号，美光科技股价上涨近 16%，而 Sandisk 股价飙升 22%。 Zacks Investment Management 首席市场策略师 Brian Mulberry 指出，目前处于领先地位的是存储芯片制造商。 “美光、SanDisk、西部数据这些表现如此出色的名字的不同之处在于，它们是内存芯片。如果你想要有足够的计算能力来完成所有计算，你就必须拥有内存，特别是 DRAM 或 H 波段内存。如果你没有内存将其从一个地方传输到另一个地方，那一切就毫无意义。因此，这些股票表现如此出色以及美光增长如此强劲的原因之一是因为最近服务器技术的重新设计意味着我们将每台服务器的内存芯片从 8 个增加到 96 个。对于这一简单组件的需求增长了 12 倍。”内存和存储芯片价格的飙升促使苹果周四提高了 iPad 和 MacBook 的价格。这给该股带来压力，导致其下跌超过 6%。英伟达、微软和 Alphabet 的股价也下跌。 :: Archive 在其他推动因素中，默克公司同意以每股 73 美元现金收购 Bio-Techne 生物技术公司（企业总价值约为 113 亿美元）后，Bio-Techne 股价大幅上涨。与此同时，美国商务部周四的数据显示，截至 5 月份的年通胀率三年来首次升至 4% 以上，但油价上涨
chineseContent: 故事：美国股市周四收盘涨跌互现，道琼斯指数上涨逾十分之一，而标准普尔 500 指数收盘持平，纳斯达克指数下跌近 0.5%。由于投资者担心超大规模企业在人工智能方面的支出以及谁来买单，科技股扭转了早期涨幅，走低。 :: 美光科技 这些担忧盖过了美光科技对人工智能需求的乐观信号，美光科技股价上涨近 16%，而 Sandisk 股价飙升 22%。 Zacks Investment Management 首席市场策略师 Brian Mulberry 指出，目前处于领先地位的是存储芯片制造商。 “美光、SanDisk、西部数据这些表现如此出色的名字的不同之处在于，它们是内存芯片。如果你想要有足够的计算能力来完成所有计算，你就必须拥有内存，特别是 DRAM 或 H 波段内存。如果你没有内存将其从一个地方传输到另一个地方，那一切就毫无意义。因此，这些股票表现如此出色以及美光增长如此强劲的原因之一是因为最近服务器技术的重新设计意味着我们将每台服务器的内存芯片从 8 个增加到 96 个。对于这一简单组件的需求增长了 12 倍。”内存和存储芯片价格的飙升促使苹果周四提高了 iPad 和 MacBook 的价格。这给该股带来压力，导致其下跌超过 6%。英伟达、微软和 Alphabet 的股价也下跌。 :: Archive 在其他推动因素中，默克公司同意以每股 73 美元现金收购 Bio-Techne 生物技术公司（企业总价值约为 113 亿美元）后，Bio-Techne 股价大幅上涨。与此同时，美国商务部周四的数据显示，截至 5 月份的年通胀率三年来首次升至 4% 以上，但油价上涨
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
